title: Pinterest Growth AI — Wave A · Foundation + Executive Overview
executive_summary: Wave A of the Pinterest Growth Intelligence Engine ships the foundation: 4 namespaced pga_* tables, one read-only edge function pga-overview-sync that derives every metric from existing infrastructure (sessions, funnel, orders, pins, pe_issue_log), and a new admin route /admin/pinterest-growth-ai with an Executive Overview panel and a Timeline panel. Zero existing Pinterest tables, edge functions, crons, or analytics surfaces were modified. Waves B through F (Creative/SEO/Product, Boards/Publishing/Trends/Competitor, A-B/Opportunities/Revenue/Timeline, Learning/Operator/Auto-fix/Daily, Final regression) are scaffolded in the approved plan and queued for the next runs.

database.rls: All admin-only via has_role(auth.uid(),'admin'); GRANT SELECT to authenticated, GRANT ALL to service_role.
database.namespacing: All Wave A-F tables prefixed pga_ to avoid collision with dense existing pinterest_* and pe_* schemas.

edge_functions.name: pga-overview-sync
edge_functions.purpose: Compute executive snapshot from existing data sources. No mutations to Pinterest, no fabricated metrics. paid_reach + roas reported honestly as 0 until ads scope reconnect (per project rule).

ai_usage: None in Wave A. Wave B onwards uses Lovable AI Gateway (google/gemini-3-flash-preview default).

pinterest.scope_dependencies: Organic-only token sufficient for Wave A overview; ads/catalogs/billing remain scope-blocked and are surfaced honestly in upcoming waves.
pinterest.additive_guarantee: Zero edits to pinterest_* tables, pinterest-* functions, pe_* tables, pe-* functions, or any analytics emit path.

quality_control.typecheck: tsgo clean after route + page added.
quality_control.fabricated_metrics: None. All metric sources documented in source_breakdown column on every snapshot row.

high: Run Wave B (Creative + SEO + Product Intelligence)
Run Wave C (Boards + Publishing + Trends + Competitor)
Run Wave E AI Operator + Daily Report (closes the autonomy loop)
medium: Run Wave D (A/B + Opportunities + Revenue Forecasts + Timeline UI)
low: Final regression + 7 closing reports in Wave F
